SEARCH
Package model.user

Class Student

java.lang.Object
model.user.User
model.user.Student
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<User>, Subscribable
Direct Known Subclasses:
GraduateStudent
public class Student extends User
General bachelor student model with academic, registration, library, and optional researcher behavior.

    • Student

  • Method Details

    • registerToCourse

      public void registerToCourse(String courseID) throws CreditOverFlow, CourseFailLimitException
      Creates a pending course registration request for this student.

      The request is stored for manager approval. Registration is rejected when the student would exceed 21 selected credits, the course is unavailable, or the student has already failed the same course three times.

      Parameters:
      courseID - identifier of the requested course
      Throws:
      CreditOverFlow - if registration exceeds the credit limit or the course is unavailable
      CourseFailLimitException - if the course was failed three times already

      public String totalGpa()
      Calculates cumulative GPA from all marks belonging to this student.
      Returns:
      GPA value formatted as a string

      public String convertToGPA(Double t)
      Converts a numeric total score to the university GPA scale.
      Parameters:
      t - total percentage score
      Returns:
      GPA value as text

      public void rateTeacher(String teacherName, int rating)
      Adds a rating to a teacher found by name.
      Parameters:
      teacherName - teacher name used for lookup
      rating - rating value, expected to be in the UI range of 1 to 5
